raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, many of my accounts were compromised. I alerted Citibank right away. They assured me that the charges would be reversed. Here we are a month later, 7 phone calls, and NOTHING. 2 of the 9 fraudulent charges are flagged as " disputed ''. They are all fraudulent. 

I called and email XXXXXXXX XXXX and told them these were fradulent and sent an email. I received confirmation, but they still processed the order. They sent to an address in XXXX I've never seen before. I provided that info to the police to no end. 

I let Citibank know multiple times. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Eligible for CitiFlex Pay XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$110.00} Disputed XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$130.00} Eligible for CitiFlex Pay XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$9.00} Disputed XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
